rag_corpus.title: Acme Q3 OKR Handbook
rag_corpus.text: Acme's Q3 OKR is to ship the multi-tenant beta program by 2026-05-15. The CEO Esra Ünal owns the launch. Pricing tiers: Self-host (free), Maintenance ($49/mo), Managed ($499/mo). Only EUR billing is supported in 2026.

rag_corpus.title: Acme Customer Onboarding Playbook
rag_corpus.text: Step 1 — warm intro email. Step 2 — schedule 30-min discovery on Google Meet. Step 3 — send the agreement letter via DocuSign. Step 4 — start trial in self-host mode. Step 5 — weekly check-in for first 30 days.

seed_inbox.subject: Re: ABS demo follow-up
seed_inbox.body: Merhaba, demo'dan sonra fiyat tablosunu paylaşır mısınız? Ekipte 4 kişiyiz, self-host paket ilgi çekiyor.

seed_inbox.subject: Invoice INV-2026-0418
seed_inbox.body: Attached invoice for April. Net-30 terms apply.

recall.transcript_seed:
[Esra] Ekibe Q3 OKR'yi hatırlatmalıyım.
[Mert] Pricing sayfası canlıya çıkacak mı?
[Esra] Evet, 15 Mayıs hedef.
[Mert] Sözleşmeyi bu hafta gönder.
